reconciliations.target: T0.3.2 [E-VCG-01/02/03/04] — M02-E jealousy corpus
reconciliations.rationale: DIM-56-001 articulates the tripartite structure of jealousy/zeal vocabulary matching M02-E's four-VCG structure. Fold note: the jealousy vocabulary shows a single inner mechanism — passionate exclusive attachment — whose moral valence is determined entirely by object and direction. M02-E-VCG-03 (sanctified) and M02-E-VCG-04 (destructive) are the poles.
